name: Placental growth-rate parameter

name: Initial villous surface area
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mayhew-2014-placental-morphometry. Technique: Light-microscopic stereology. Population: Stereological measurements of human placentae across gestation.

applicability.population: Stereological measurements of human placentae across gestation

notes: Effective villous exchange surface area at the start of gestation (early-pregnancy reference).
